architect_decision_intent: Use SVG only as a candidate for scalable vector artwork while preserving editable text boundaries.
use_when_applied: The asset is vector artwork or iconography.
Scaling should stay crisp and non-raster.
avoid_when_considered: The content is real editable/searchable text.
decision_questions_answered: The asset is vector artwork rather than raster media.
The card is used only for candidate reasoning.
unresolved_risks: Target WordPress project SVG upload and sanitization policy is not known.
limitations: Official docs support the documented SVG element only; they do not prove project availability or correct section design.
proof_gap_acknowledgements: Correct design choice still requires Architect decision evidence and CE review.
